title.en: China-to-Australia Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Australia GEMS MEPS and energy labelling, AS/NZS 3823 and AS/NZS 4234 test frameworks, RCM electrical safety under AS/NZS 60335.2.40 and EESS, and refrigerant obligations under the Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas Management framework.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与澳大利亚GEMS最低能源性能标准和能效标签、AS/NZS 3823和AS/NZS 4234测试框架、基于AS/NZS 60335.2.40和EESS的RCM电气安全，以及臭氧保护和合成温室气体管理框架下制冷剂义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與澳洲GEMS最低能源性能標準和能效標籤、AS/NZS 3823和AS/NZS 4234測試框架、基於AS/NZS 60335.2.40和EESS的RCM電氣安全，以及臭氧保護和合成溫室氣體管理框架下制冷劑義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, electrical safety approval, GEMS registration decision, refrigerant import licence assessment, installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, responsible suppliers, and installers should verify current Australian law, GEMS determinations, EESS rules, state electrical safety law, refrigerant licensing obligations, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or supply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、电气安全批准、GEMS注册决定、制冷剂进口许可评估、安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、责任供应商和安装方在出货或供应前，应与合格专业人士核实现行澳大利亚法律、GEMS裁定、EESS规则、州电气安全法律、制冷剂许可义务和安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、電氣安全批准、GEMS註冊決定、制冷劑進口許可評估、安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、責任供應商和安裝方在出貨或供應前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳洲法律、GEMS裁定、EESS規則、州電氣安全法律、制冷劑許可義務和安裝規則。

answer_first.en: GEMS registration, MEPS and Zoned Energy Rating Label evidence under the applicable air-conditioner determination, RCM marking through an Australian or New Zealand Responsible Supplier, EESS safety evidence to AS/NZS 60335.2.40, and Ozone/SGG refrigerant controls are the major Australia compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps.
answer_first.zh: 适用空调裁定下的GEMS注册、MEPS和分区能效标签证据，通过澳大利亚或新西兰责任供应商使用RCM标志，按AS/NZS 60335.2.40提供EESS安全证据，以及臭氧/合成温室气体制冷剂管控，是中国空气源热泵进入澳大利亚的主要合规差距。
answer_first.zht: 適用空調裁定下的GEMS註冊、MEPS和分區能效標籤證據，通過澳洲或紐西蘭責任供應商使用RCM標誌，按AS/NZS 60335.2.40提供EESS安全證據，以及臭氧/合成溫室氣體制冷劑管控，是中國空氣源熱泵進入澳洲的主要合規差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
